Interface ReactiveCassandraTemplate.ReactivePreparedStatementHandler

All Superinterfaces:
CqlProvider, PreparedStatementBinder, ReactivePreparedStatementCreator
All Known Implementing Classes:
ReactiveCassandraTemplate.PreparedStatementHandler
Enclosing class:
ReactiveCassandraTemplate
public static interface ReactiveCassandraTemplate.ReactivePreparedStatementHandler extends ReactivePreparedStatementCreator, PreparedStatementBinder, CqlProvider
General callback interface used to create and bind prepared CQL statements.

This interface prepares the CQL statement and sets values on a PreparedStatement as union-type comprised from ReactivePreparedStatementCreator, PreparedStatementBinder, and CqlProvider.

Since:
3.3.3
Author:
Mark Paluch, John Blum, Lukasz Antoniak, Hleb Albau, Sam Lightfoot
